- Our project, [NAAMSE](https://hashiru-ai.github.io/naamse-website/), won the 2nd place in the Agent Safety Track at the 2026 AgentX - AgentBeats competition, organized by Berkeley RDI. [See the announcement here](https://berkeleyrdi.substack.com/p/agentic-ai-weekly-berkeley-rdi-february-228). A huge thank you to my collaborators, Parth Shah and Harshil Patel, for their incredible work on this project!
